description: Show detail on a specified Project Stage.

is_bidding_stage.description: Project Stage is bidding stage status

is_concept_stage.description: Indicates if the stage is a concept stage

category.description: The Category Type of the Project Stage

readonly.description: Indicates whether the stage is editable or deletable

default_stage.description: Indicates if the stage was created automatically by Procore and is not editable nor deletable

hideable.description: Indicates if the stage is hideable or not

has_rfi_prefixes.description: Indicates if the stage has RFI prefixes

project_stage_has_children.description: Indicates if the stage has children
